title: Who this guide applies to
description: Find out if this guide applies to you.

content_blocks.text: When we say 'you' or 'professional sportsperson', we are referring to a person who makes their living by playing a professional sport as an employee. For example:
This guide doesn't deal with the tax obligations of support staff, coaches, referees or umpires – see Fitness and sporting industry employees .

content_text:
When we say 'you' or 'professional sportsperson', we are referring to a person who makes their living by playing a professional sport as an employee. For example:
- athletes
- footballer
- basketballer
- cricketer.
This guide doesn't deal with the tax obligations of support staff, coaches, referees or umpires – see Fitness and sporting industry employees .
